title: X'Tingian
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''X'Tingian''' was the language of the [[X'Ting]], the [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] native [[Species/Legends|species]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. It replaced a previous language, [[Old X'Tingian]].

X'Tingian used buzzes and clicks to convey information in its "oral" form. To create a "written" X'Tingian, scents were to be stored and then smelled when wanting to "read". This was the heritage of Old X'Tingian, which used scents to convey information "orally".

[[ChikatLik]] was an X'Tingian word meaning "the center" and [[Tolmeatek]] meant "untravelable."

{{Language-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''
*''[[The Hive]]''
